CustomField.description: Boolean yields true or false if any of the SAI fields say Turnback or Rejected
CustomField.formula: And ( OR( CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Water__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Water__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Air__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Air__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Soil_Solids__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Soil_Solids__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Maternal_Fetal_Health__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Maternal_Fetal_Health__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Newborn_Screening__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Newborn_Screening__c),"Rejected"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Applied_Genomics__c),"Turnback"), CONTAINS (TEXT(Status_Applied_Genomics__c),"Rejected") ) )
CustomField.label: Is TurnBack or Rejected 3
